title: anacamptis pyramidalis f. tanayensis
intro: Anacamptis pyramidalis f. tanayensis, also known as the Tanay Pyramidal Orchid, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Pyramidal Orchid (Anacamptis pyramidalis) found in the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The Tanay Pyramidal Orchid is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Anacamptis pyramidalis f. tanayensis include infusions and decoctions, often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
